calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-28-2015 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment
Off Calendar May-21-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Patricia Walsh, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, MCMILLAN BROS. ELECTRIC, INC.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) WARD ALAN EMERY CONSTRUCTION, INC.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Patrick McMillan worn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $316,908.29
Pre-Judgment Interest: $69,920.31
Attorney's Fees: $11,481.00
Costs: $1,245.87
Other: B & P s. 7108.5 fees: $165,432.75
Total Judgment in the amount of $564,988.22
Judgment signed in open court.
